entries.message: Global 'Error' loses type safety as untagged errors merge together in the Effect failure channel. Consider using a tagged error and optionally wrapping the original in a 'cause' property.
Global 'Error' loses type safety as untagged errors merge together in the Effect failure channel. Consider using a tagged error and optionally wrapping the original in a 'cause' property.

This layer provides PerContextRuntimeOutputWriter which is required by another layer in the same Layer.mergeAll call. Layer.mergeAll creates layers in parallel, so dependencies between layers will not be satisfied. Consider moving this layer into a Layer.provideMerge after the Layer.mergeAll.
